local_product.name: rapp-stack-cubby
local_product.truth: This working repository was absent from the public account inventory at the cutoff and is represented separately as the complete local product context.

evidence.snapshot_semantics: bounded non-atomic observation window; each head is paired with its own API response time

prompts.prompt: Trace one idea through reviewed source, CUBBY, rapplication, egg, controller, isolated twin, signed twin-chat, owner iMessage, and exact-commit release preparation.
prompts.title: One idea to public product.

prompts.prompt: Explain every selected local stage and clearly separate implemented components from mapped neighborhood, fleet, and cloud references.
prompts.title: Map the whole RAPP system.

prompts.prompt: Run the context, catalog, Pages, privacy, unit, and repository gates and summarize only evidence produced by those checks.
prompts.title: Verify this repository.

prompts.prompt: Fetch only locked inert dependencies, build twice with one revision and epoch, and prove every output byte is equal.
prompts.title: Build the deterministic artifact chain.

prompts.prompt: Verify a CUBBY egg, hatch it offline into separate workspace and state roots, inspect its receipt, and stop before starting services.
prompts.title: Hatch an isolated twin.

prompts.prompt: Walk through identity binding, P-256 signatures, freshness, durable replay handling, nonce binding, and signed responses without exposing private state.
prompts.title: Explain signed twin-chat.

prompts.prompt: Follow the fresh-fork tutorial through prerequisites and content-free preflight, leaving enrollment and live sending for the release operator.
prompts.title: Prepare owner-only iMessage.

prompts.prompt: Use the implementation and capability matrices to show who owns all selected capabilities and why reference-only entries are not local claims.
prompts.title: Inspect capability ownership.

prompts.prompt: Start with one direct-evidence capability, follow its context route, and identify its tested code, schema, decision, runbook, and remaining gap.
prompts.title: Trace evidence to implementation.

prompts.prompt: Validate version and tag, build and hatch twice from one clean commit, prepare external sidecars, and stop before publication unless every gate is proven.
prompts.title: Prepare an exact-commit release.
